name: enwords

scripts.release:patch: npm version patch -m "Release %s" && npm publish --access public
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor -m "Release %s" && npm publish --access public
scripts.release:major: npm version major -m "Release %s" && npm publish --access public

author: Timothy T. Joe <timtjoe@gmail.com>
description: This library is used to generate sets of 2, 3, or 4 letter English words based on a given pattern.
